title: thymus × citratus var. citriodorus
intro: Thymus × citratus var. citriodorus, also known as Lemon Thyme, is a type of flowering plant in the mint family, Lamiaceae. It is a natural remedy known for its antimicrobial, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant properties, making it effective in treating various health issues. The medicinal properties of Lemon Thyme have been used to alleviate symptoms of respiratory problems, such as bronchitis and coughs, as well as to soothe digestive issues like bloating and indigestion. Lemon Thyme can be consumed as a tea, infused in oil, or added to food and drinks, and it is also used in herbal preparations, including capsules and tinctures, to harness its health benefits.
